apply: Identify the geographical features that facilitated the growth of the Silk Road.
Analyze the impact of the Silk Road on the social and cultural development of the regions it connected.
Explain how the Silk Road contributed to the growth of cities and towns along its route.
analyze: Compare the Silk Road with other major trade routes of the ancient world.
Evaluate the significance of the Silk Road in the context of global history.
Discuss the challenges faced by traders and travelers on the Silk Road and their impact on the route's development.
remember: Recall the major trade routes, cities, and countries that were part of the Silk Road.
List the goods that were traded on the Silk Road and their significance.
Mention the importance of the Silk Road in the history of international trade.
understand: Explain the reasons behind the establishment of the Silk Road and its impact on the economy of the region.
Describe the role of the Silk Road in the spread of cultures, ideas, and technologies.
Discuss the influence of the Silk Road on the development of trade and commerce in the Indian subcontinent.

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of the Silk Road as a major trade route in the ancient world.
To identify the key cities and countries that were part of the Silk Road.
To explain the impact of the Silk Road on the spread of cultures, ideas, and technologies.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the geographical features that facilitated the growth of the Silk Road.
To describe the role of the Silk Road in the history of international trade.
To explain the impact of the Silk Road on the social and cultural development of the regions it connected.
